_comment: Drop-in secrets file for Adafruit_Wippersnapper_Arduino when running against the HIL bench's local ProtoMQ broker instead of io.adafruit.com. Copy to secrets.json (with leading underscores keys removed) and let the HIL controller substitute values from per-repo secrets at flash time. See examples/README.md for the substitution flow.
_field_provenance: Field names match vendor/wippersnapper-arduino/src/provisioning/ConfigJson.cpp on the migrate-api-v2 branch: io_url (defaults to io.adafruit.com) and io_port (defaults to 8883) are top-level overrides that target the MQTT broker.
